items.title: Bitcoin miners tied to AI rise as Nvidia posts big earnings beat and strong outlook
items.summary: Nvidia's stronger-than-expected results and bullish AI outlook lifted crypto mining stocks tied to data center and high-performance computing demand, even as the chipmaker's shares fell due to growth concerns.

items.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
items.summary: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

items.title: EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps
items.summary: EU opens MiCA review as consultation probes stablecoin interest rules, DeFi risks and classification gaps ahead of July's crypto authorization deadline.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Binance launches SpaceX pre-IPO perps amid $2 trillion valuation bets
items.summary: Binance looks to democratize pre-IPO markets, starting with SpaceX perpetual futures.

items.title: Don't call us just a WLFI treasury company, says AI Financial
items.summary: The company says it is building a broader fintech, tokenization and digital infrastructure business, but its latest SEC filing shows WLFI still dominates the balance sheet.

items.title: Here's why bitcoin turned lower from the 200-day average
items.summary: BTC recently turned lower from the 200-day average, a barometer of long-term trends. CryptoQuant explains why.

items.title: Silvergate’s Fraher breaks silence on settlement with Gensler’s SEC
items.summary: Former Silvergate executive Kate Fraher said the rule that prevented her from sharing her side of the story was unconstitutional. It was finally lifted by the SEC this week.

items.title: Tax evaders are trying ‘novel digital assets’ to dodge authorities: Chainalysis
items.summary: Italian authorities uncovered a tax evasion scheme in which an individual allegedly used Bitcoin Ordinals and the BRC-20 token standard to generate and conceal $1.1 million.

items.title: Syndicate Labs winds down after 5 years, citing shrinking rollup market
items.summary: The Ethereum rollup market is dominated by Arbitrum and Base, which have a combined 68% market share, according to L2Beat.

items.title: SEC seeks public comment as it weighs prediction market ETFs
items.summary: Bitwise, Roundhill Investments and GraniteShares had their prediction market ETF applications put on hold by the SEC earlier this month.

items.title: Hyperliquid ETFs surprise with 50% volume jump after slow launch
items.summary: ETF analyst Eric Balchunas says crypto and traditional assets are trading down while Hyperliquid is up, leading to a boon for ETFs tied to the token.

items.title: Map Protocol token plummets 96% after a quadrillion token mint exploit
items.summary: The attacker tricked the Butter Network cross-chain bridge into minting millions more tokens than the legitimate supply of MAPO.

items.title: Bitcoin treasury Nakamoto plans reverse stock split to save ailing share price
items.summary: Shares in Nakamoto closed Wednesday at 16 cents. They are down more than 99% from May last year, when the stock traded above $25.

items.title: SpaceX reveals larger-than-expected Bitcoin holdings in IPO filing
items.summary: SpaceX is expected to go public next month, which would make its 18,712 Bitcoin holdings rank seventh among public companies.

items.title: Polymarket moves to list parlays while SEC seeks public input on prediction market ETFs
items.summary: The "combinatorial outcome contracts" would resolve if every part of an underlying contract resolved, according to a filing.

items.title: Federal Reserve proposes limited master accounts long pursued by crypto firms
items.summary: The U.S. Fed issued a revised proposal on the structure of payment accounts, taking the next step to build on an earlier pitch for so-called skinny accounts.

items.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX held 18,712 bitcoin at fair value of $1.29 billion at end of Q1, IPO filing shows
items.summary: The rocket and satellite company is looking to go public at a valuation of more than $1.5 trillion.

items.title: Securitize posts record revenue in the first quarter as it gears up for public listing
items.summary: The tokenization platform reported record quarterly revenue but continued to post losses as it invested in growth and public-company preparations tied to its merger with Cantor Equity Partners II.

items.title: Latest Congressional swing at crypto tax reform would direct IRS to review de minimis exemptions
items.summary: The newest version of the Parity Act updates language around payment stablecoins and directs the IRS to report on how a de minimis exemption might work.
